campaign_title: The Future of Advertising is Here

key_findings.competition_level: LOWER than previous campaign (6 perfect vs 15 before)

cross_campaign_comparison.conclusion: Easier competition, fewer perfect scorers, same weak dimensions

monitor_checks.action_required: BUILD URGENT - mission not_built, deadline ~40 hours
monitor_checks.reason: No content to compare. Landscape tracked. 6/100 at 18/18 achievable. Originality + Engagement Potential remain hardest dims (same as prev campaign). BUILD should leverage knowledge from previous campaign.

inherited_patterns_from_prev_campaign.note: Patterns from 'Rally Owns the Narrative' still relevant - same creator, similar rules, same scoring. Merged from rally_pattern_cache_new.json (2026-04-09).

top_performers.notes: Conceptual pitch, paradigm shift framing, signal vs surface metrics
Philosophical contrast noise vs systems, reframed technical points
Contrarian hook challenging follower size assumption, bullet structure
Framed Rally as infrastructure not platform, conceptual take

top_hooks: everyone's focused on the wrong thing about Rally
people still think web3 marketing is about follower size
Most people chase noise. A few position for systems that quietly rewrite the rules.

overused_phrases.note: Mandatory topic but find unique framing
Important detail, include but don't center

winning_patterns: Reframe technical points into narrative/conceptual framing
Personal voice with distinct perspective, not corporate tone
Challenge status quo of web3 marketing measurement
Stream-of-consciousness or self-doubt elements for authenticity
unique_gaps: Trustless payment pipeline vs traditional agency model
common_failures: 70% get Originality 1/2 - AI-sounding language, template structure
83% get Engagement 4/5 or less - generic hooks, weak CTAs
Most use same angles: quality>followers, being early, AI scoring
best_practices: Start with bold, contrarian or philosophical statement
Use personal voice with genuine conviction
Strategic line breaks, no numbered lists
End with implicit CTA or provocative question

calibration.competition_level: HIGH - 30% get max Originality, 17% get max Engagement
